title: LEGO Star Wars 75420 SMART Play: Luke's Landspeeder - Compatible Interactive Toy Set incl. SMART Tag and Luke Skywalker Minifigure - Gift Idea for 6+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play Compatible set features a landspeeder with a SMART Tag, and a SMART Luke Skywalker minifigure with a Lightsaber, plus a service station, Jawa and a Gonk Droid

THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to the landspeeder's SMART Tag, a LEGO SMART Brick (not included) responds to motion and colours with lights and sounds, activating the horn, refuelling and repair functions
LEGO SMART STAR WARS MINIFIGURE – Bring SMART Luke Skywalker to life with a SMART Brick (not included) for responsive play, triggering reactions to movements and situations he experiences

HOW TO ACTIVATE YOUR SET – A LEGO SMART Brick from an All-in-One set 75421, 75423 or 75427 (sold separately) is required to enable immersive play functions (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate classic movie scenes: role-play as Luke Skywalker explores the Tatooine desert in his landspeeder, imagining encounters with the Jawa and a Gonk Droid for endless Star Wars adventures
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this interactive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 6+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors
DIGITAL INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app guides your child on an intuitive adventure that lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, as well as save and track their progress
description: From the manufacturer Building toy for action play Play out Star Wars: A New Hope stories Refuel and repair Luke’s landspeeder and grab a carton of blue milk at the service station, ready for exciting fantasy adventures, with this LEGO Star Wars SMART Play Compatible Set for kids.
